title: Tabby
description: Tabby is a highly customisable Fabric mod for Minecraft that adds extra utility to the tab list
body: TABBY HAS BEEN MERGED WITH [YTTRIUM](https://modrinth com/mod/yttrium). Please download it instead ❤️ # Tabby Tabby is a highly customisable Fabric mod for Minecraft that adds extra utility to the tab list such as: - Configurable settings to change the amount of players shown and the amount of rows - A highly configurable file to define groups of name colours and formats, full RGB and Minecraft formatting, read [here](https://github.com/Fruitloopins/Tabby#groups-config) for setup help - Option to remove or change the headers and footers on tab, no more obnoxious advertising # Info Please join my Discord [here](https://discord.gg/ey6ZvnwAJp) for support and discussion. My username is fruitloopins. - Tabby is client-sided only - There are no plans to backport Tabby for older Minecraft versions or make a Forge port Read [here](https://github.com/Fruitloopins/Tabby) for further help. ![Tabby](https://cdn-raw.modrinth.com/data/GTVNY7Yu/images/02395f5c368eeb5c3015a4cc51afc8cab149d2e0.png)
